'''ngakozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coacervate|coacervate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coacervate|coacervate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngakozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækezeth|ngækezeth]] || [[word:ngækezej|ngækezej]] || [[word:ngækezesh|ngækezesh]] || [[word:ngækeze|ngækeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakokozoth|ngakokozoth]] || [[word:ngakokozoj|ngakokozoj]] || [[word:ngakokozosh|ngakokozosh]] || [[word:ngakokozo|ngakokozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakozoth|ngakozoth]] || [[word:ngakozoj|ngakozoj]] || [[word:ngakozosh|ngakozosh]] || [[word:ngakozo|ngakozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakofzoth|ngakofzoth]] || [[word:ngakofzoj|ngakofzoj]] || [[word:ngakofzosh|ngakofzosh]] || [[word:ngakofzof|ngakofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakozotho|ngakozotho]] || [[word:ngakozojo|ngakozojo]] || [[word:ngakozosho|ngakozosho]] || [[word:ngakozoko|ngakozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakozoth|ngakozoth]] || [[word:ngakozoj|ngakozoj]] || [[word:ngakozosh|ngakozosh]] || [[word:ngakozo|ngakozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakozothol|ngakozothol]] || [[word:ngakozojol|ngakozojol]] || [[word:ngakozoshol|ngakozoshol]] || [[word:ngakozokol|ngakozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakozothotho|ngakozothotho]] || [[word:ngakozojojo|ngakozojojo]] || [[word:ngakozoshosho|ngakozoshosho]] || [[word:ngakozoko|ngakozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakozothon|ngakozothon]] || [[word:ngakozojon|ngakozojon]] || [[word:ngakozoshon|ngakozoshon]] || [[word:ngakozokon|ngakozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakozothoro|ngakozothoro]] || [[word:ngakozojoro|ngakozojoro]] || [[word:ngakozoshoro|ngakozoshoro]] || [[word:ngakozokoro|ngakozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
